evals.name: decoupled-cross-module
evals.prompt: Using go_router_modular, when an order is placed in the Checkout module, the Cart module should clear itself and a snackbar should show — without the two modules referencing each other directly. Wire it with events.
evals.expected_output: A small immutable event class (e.g. OrderPlaced with a const constructor), Checkout emitting via ModularEvent.fire, and Cart reacting via EventModule.listen() + on<OrderPlaced> (or ModularEventMixin for the snackbar), null-checking the callback context. The two modules share only the event class — no direct import. Uses only EventModule/ModularEvent/ModularEventMixin.
